entries.en-US: > This file extends [common/patterns.md](../common/patterns.md) with Swift specific content.
entries.zh-Hans: > 本文档扩展了 [common/patterns.md](../common/patterns.md) 的内容，增加了 Swift 特有的部分。

entries.en-US: Define small, focused protocols. Use protocol extensions for shared defaults:
entries.zh-Hans: 定义小而专注的协议。使用协议扩展来提供共享的默认实现：

entries.en-US:
```swift
protocol Repository: Sendable {
    associatedtype Item: Identifiable & Sendable
    func find(by id: Item.ID) async throws -> Item?
    func save(_ item: Item) async throws
}
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```swift
protocol Repository: Sendable {
    associatedtype Item: Identifiable & Sendable
    func find(by id: Item.ID) async throws -> Item?
    func save(_ item: Item) async throws
}
```

entries.en-US:
- Use structs for data transfer objects and models
- Use enums with associated values to model distinct states:
entries.zh-Hans:
* 使用结构体作为数据传输对象和模型
* 使用带有关联值的枚举来建模不同的状态：

entries.en-US:
```swift
enum LoadState<T: Sendable>: Sendable {
    case idle
    case loading
    case loaded(T)
    case failed(Error)
}
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```swift
enum LoadState<T: Sendable>: Sendable {
    case idle
    case loading
    case loaded(T)
    case failed(Error)
}
```

entries.en-US: Use actors for shared mutable state instead of locks or dispatch queues:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 actor 来处理共享可变状态，而不是锁或调度队列：

entries.en-US: Inject protocols with default parameters — production uses defaults, tests inject mocks:
entries.zh-Hans: 通过默认参数注入协议 —— 生产环境使用默认值，测试时注入模拟对象：

entries.en-US:
See skill: `swift-actor-persistence` for actor-based persistence patterns.
See skill: `swift-protocol-di-testing` for protocol-based DI and testing.
entries.zh-Hans:
关于基于 actor 的持久化模式，请参阅技能：`swift-actor-persistence`。
关于基于协议的依赖注入和测试，请参阅技能：`swift-protocol-di-testing`。
